title: Kingdom Fall
learning_objectives: Exploit AD misconfiguration and weak permissions
Compromise domain controllers and forest root
Document attack path from user to domain admin
scenario: Scenario Multi-forest AD with 3 domains. Standard user in child domain. Achieve Enterprise Admin in root domain through AD-native attack paths only — no CVE exploitation. Subtasks Scoring Rubric Linked Recipes: RA09, RA10 ________________________________________________________________________________

scenario_context.challenge: Exploit AD misconfiguration in Kampala, Uganda to compromise domain
scenario_context.relevance: Reflects real-world African enterprise security challenges and red team operations across the continent

subtasks.title: BloodHound Collection & Analysis
subtasks.description: Run collectors. Identify all paths to DA and EA.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Begin by thoroughly reviewing the scenario and understanding all objectives. Document your approach before execution. This is the foundational subtask that enables all following work.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: ACL Abuse Chain
subtasks.evidence: ACL exploitation log with permission chain
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Conduct systematic reconnaissance and information gathering. Map the target network, identify services, and document all findings with evidence.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed
subtasks.evidence_required: ACL exploitation log with permission chain

subtasks.title: Delegation Attack
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Analyze vulnerabilities discovered in reconnaissance. Validate each vulnerability through testing and document the exploitation path.

subtasks.title: Domain Admin Achievement
subtasks.detailed_guidance:

subtasks.title: Cross-Domain Escalation
subtasks.description: Pivot from child DA to Enterprise Admin.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Establish persistence mechanisms that survive system reboots and will maintain access throughout the engagement.

Specific to this mission:

subtasks.title: AD Security Assessment
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Perform privilege escalation and lateral movement to achieve the mission objectives. Document each pivot point.

mentor_notes: For OA-M07 - Kingdom Fall: Ensure learner demonstrates proper OPSEC, evidence collection, and professional reporting. This mission is designed to build advanced ad attacks expertise. Coordinate with blue team for detection validation where applicable.
